user_query: Father likes eggs for breakfast. Add a classic egg based breakfast option for him on the day with the Smoky Base Pork Dinner

fields.name: Classic Scrambled Eggs & Sourdough
fields.short_description: Fluffy scrambled eggs served with toasted sourdough bread and a side of grilled tomatoes.
fields.meal_suggestion: Whisk three large eggs with a splash of milk and a pinch of salt. Cook in a non-stick skillet over medium-low heat, stirring gently until soft curds form. Serve alongside two slices of toasted sourdough bread and lightly charred cherry tomatoes.
fields.nutrition_note: Eggs provide high-quality protein and choline; sourdough offers a lower glycemic index carbohydrate source; tomatoes add lycopene and vitamin C. A classic, satiating breakfast.

result.reasoning: The user requested an egg-based breakfast on the day with the 'Smoky' dinner. Day 6 contains 'Smoky Combo' breakfast wraps and aligns with the 'Smoky' theme mentioned in the query. Position -1 appends this classic option to the existing breakfast list for Father on Day 6.
